Title: Verify Dashboard Activity is launched
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify the DashboardActivity is displayed

Title: Verify Main Activity is launched
Test Steps:
1. Navigate from DashboardActivity to MainActivity
2. Verify the MainActivity is displayed

Title: Verify Sign Up Activity is launched
Test Steps:
1. Navigate from MainActivity to SignUpActivity
2. Verify the SignUpActivity is displayed

Title: Verify User List Activity is launched
Test Steps:
1. Navigate from MainActivity to UserListActivity
2. Verify the UserListActivity is displayed

Title: Verify Home page is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify the Home page is displayed

Title: Verify weather data is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Click on the 'Weather' button
2. Verify the weather data is displayed

Title: Verify past training data is displayed
Test Steps:
1. Click on the 'Health' button
2. Verify the past training data is displayed

Title: Verify trekking route selection process
Test Steps:
1. Click on the 'Trekking' button
2. Verify the list of provinces is displayed
3. Select a province
4. Verify the list of routes within the selected province is displayed
5. Select a route
Expected Result: The selected trekking route is displayed

Title: Verify error handling when no routes are available
Test Data: No routes available for the selected province
Test Steps:
1. Click on the 'Trekking' button
2. Verify the list of provinces is displayed
3. Select a province with no available routes
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating no routes are available for the selected province

Title: Verify login functionality
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Click the 'Login' button
Expected Result: User is logged in and navigated to the appropriate activity

Title: Verify error handling for invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid credentials
2. Click the 'Login' button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

Title: Verify sign up functionality
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid user data
2. Click the 'Sign Up' button
Expected Result: User is registered and navigated to the login screen

Title: Verify error handling for invalid user data
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid user data
2. Click the 'Sign Up' button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid user data

Title: Verify user list is displayed
Test Steps: 1. Verify the user list is displayed

Title: Verify error handling when no users are available
Test Steps: 1. Verify the user list is displayed
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating no users are available

Title: Verify zoom functionality
Test Steps: 1. Zoom in on the weather data
Expected Result: The weather data is zoomed in

Title: Verify error handling when zooming in on unsupported data
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to zoom in on unsupported data
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the data is unsupported and cannot be zoomed in
